creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: crees->freebsd-ports-bugs

Following our private conversation, I am of the opinion that this 
software is impossible to port without permission from Sophos to mirror 
the distfile in a versioned manner; we cannot have the distfile changing 
in place. 

If anyone has any clever ideas, please let them speak up now!
